'''chachate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rhetorically|rhetorically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ch-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rhetorically|rhetorically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chachate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:chachate|chachate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chachatesher|chachatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chachatesherĂ«m|chachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chachatero|chachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chachateshĂ«|chachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chachateshĂ«m|chachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichachatero|gokichachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichachateshĂ«|gokichachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichachateshĂ«m|gokichachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochachankerom|gochachankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochachankeshĂ«|gochachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochachankeshĂ«m|gochachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochachankeya|gochachankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chachaterom|chachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chachatemu|chachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chachateya|chachateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichachaterom|gokichachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichachatemu|gokichachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichachateya|gokichachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:chachachate|chachachate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chachachatesher|chachachatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chachachatesherĂ«m|chachachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chachachatero|chachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chachachateshĂ«|chachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chachachateshĂ«m|chachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichachachatero|gokichachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichachachateshĂ«|gokichachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichachachateshĂ«m|gokichachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochachachankerom|gochachachankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochachachankeshĂ«|gochachachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochachachankeshĂ«m|gochachachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochachachankeya|gochachachankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chachachaterom|chachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chachachatemu|chachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chachachateya|chachachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichachachaterom|gokichachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichachachatemu|gokichachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichachachateya|gokichachachateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:chĂŠchĂŠte|chĂŠchĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chĂŠchĂŠtesher|chĂŠchĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m|chĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠchĂŠtero|chĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|chĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|chĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠchĂŠtero|gokichĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|gokichĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|gokichĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochĂŠchĂŠnkerom|gochĂŠchĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«|gochĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gochĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochĂŠchĂŠnkeya|gochĂŠchĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠchĂŠterom|chĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠchĂŠtemu|chĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chĂŠchĂŠteya|chĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠchĂŠterom|gokichĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠchĂŠtemu|gokichĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichĂŠchĂŠteya|gokichĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:chafchafte|chafchafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chafchaftesher|chafchaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafchaftesherĂ«m|chafchaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafchaftero|chafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chafchafteshĂ«|chafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafchafteshĂ«m|chafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafchaftero|gokichafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichafchafteshĂ«|gokichafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafchafteshĂ«m|gokichafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochafchafnkerom|gochafchafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochafchafnkeshĂ«|gochafchafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochafchafnkeshĂ«m|gochafchafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochafchafnkeya|gochafchafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafchafterom|chafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafchaftemu|chafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chafchafteya|chafchafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafchafterom|gokichafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafchaftemu|gokichafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichafchafteya|gokichafchafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
